chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1064 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.5039/2020 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 30.08.2023 Since filing of this petition on 13.10.2020, petitioner and his Counsel have not pursued it. Even today, they are absent without any intimation. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
